title: Ice Cream!
lyrics:
[verse 1]
Dad turned so quick—*vroom!*
The car went zoom, zoom, zoom!
I bounced up high—*splat!*
We’re here! Let’s go, let’s go!

[chorus]
Ice cream! Ice cream!
Cold and sweet and tall!
Ice cream! Ice cream!
I love it most of all!

[verse 2]
Choc’late? Vanilla?
I can’t decide, oh no!
Sprinkles on the top—
Yay! Here we go, go, go!

[chorus]
Ice cream! Ice cream!
Cold and sweet and tall!
Ice cream! Ice cream!
I love it most of all!

[ending]
Sticky hands, big smile,
Snuggle in so tight.
Sweet dreams, ice cream night!
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, full musical production, xylophone, bass, and tambourine, 129 BPM, super bouncy, high energy, strong groove, clear warm vocal, strong singalong chorus, every word easy to understand
scene: The backseat of the minivan at 4:37 PM, sticky fingers still clutching the crumpled McDonald’s bag—then Dad turns the corner and the golden arches glow through the window, and you shriek "ICE CREAM!" while launching yourself halfway over the seat, knees digging into the leather, sun-warmed hair whipping as you spin toward the drive-thru speaker.
cover_description: Kid in car seat, arms up, ice cream cone glowing in the drive-thru window.
